_comment: v1 target companies for the Signal Engine.
See .claude/docs/DECISION_LOG.md DL-2026-014 for the picky selection rationale.
Each entry needs: ticker, cik (for SEC), ir_quarterly_url (for transcript discovery),
and a short narrative_profile for documentation / cross-referencing.
To add a ticker, verify it has FactSet-style PDF transcripts on a Q4 Inc. CDN
by manually visiting its IR quarterly-results page; if unsure, fall back to the

companies.narrative_profile: AI accelerator leader; dense analyst Q&A; China regulatory exposure; Blackwell ramp narrative.

Semi peer to NVDA under sustained strategic pressure: CEO turnover, foundry pivot, AI product delays, capex dispute, multiple quarters of distinct narrative reframing — a rich source of Narrative Drift, Omission Events, and Confidence Shifts.
AI capex pivot; Reality Labs losses; advertising cyclicality; Zuckerberg capital-allocation narrative.
